title: Ruby Ore Kit
description: This is a modpack that add the ruby ore to the game
body:
Simple Ruby Ore is a straightforward mod that introduces a new, basic Ruby Ore into the world of Minecraft.

It currently adds:

The Ruby Ore that spawns in the Overworld.

You haver a complete set of armor, weapons and tools.

This mod is perfect for modpack creators looking for a new, simple mineral for progression, or for players who want a small, vanilla-style addition to their game!
